affiliations.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司

fullName.display: 詹姆斯（吉姆）·维尼弗莱德·黑魔法三世

backstory.original: James Winifred Darkmagic III is the scion of a mysterious, multiplanar wizarding family. As an entertainer and purveyor of the 'Jim Darkmagic Experience,' the legendary mage can often be found in markets and town squares performing feats of mundane legerdemain. The renown he has earned for these feats is nearly equaled by the reputation that follows him as a Chief Arcanist (and occasional arsonist) for Acquisitions Incorporated.
backstory.display: 詹姆斯·维尼弗莱德·黑魔法三世，是一个神秘、多位面巫师家族的后代。作为一个艺人和“吉姆黑魔法体验”的传播者，这位传奇法师经常在市场和城镇广场表演他平凡的戏法。他因这些行为而赢得的声誉，几乎等同于他作为艾奎兹玄有限责任公司首席奥术师（偶尔也是纵火犯）的声誉。

description.original: Jim attacks random enemies with his own brand of magic missiles.
description.display: 吉姆用带有自身特色的魔法飞弹攻击随机敌人。

description.original: Jim attacks all enemies with a showy shower of sparks.
description.display: 吉姆用如冰雹般落下的火花攻击全部敌人。

longDescription.original: Jim attacks all enemies with a showy shower of sparks and energizes his Fan Club for 15 seconds.
longDescription.display: 吉姆用如冰雹般落下的火花攻击全部敌人，并为他的粉丝俱乐部充能 15 秒。

description.original: Jim buffs himself based on the number of Champions in the columns on front of and behind him
description.display: 吉姆根据其前后列中勇士的数量，来提高自身的伤害。

description.desc: Whenever the formation is under attack, Jim hides in a small protective (cardboard) box and fires twice as many Magic Missiles when he attacks.
在阵型遭受攻击时，吉姆藏身于一个小保护（纸板）箱中，并放出两倍数量的魔法飞弹攻击敌人。
Increases the damage of Jim and everyone in the columns in front of and behind him by $(amount)% for each affected Champion, stacking multiplicatively.
每有一个受影响的勇士，吉姆和他前列及后列所有人的伤害提升 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Jim buffs and is buffed by Champions in the columns in front of and behind him.
tipText.display: 吉姆会为自己前后列的勇士提供增益，同时从他们那里获得增益。

description.desc: Every $(trigger_every) attacks, Jim uses his Wand of Wonder. It provides one of five random effects:^^- Turns a random enemy into a Large Warty Toad, stunning it for $(stun_time___2) seconds and then slowing it for $(slow_time___2) seconds after the stun wears off. It maintains its pre-transformation health.^- Turns a random enemy into an Abyssal Chicken, reducing its max health by $(reduce_health_orders_of_mag___3) orders of magnitude to a minimum of $(min_health___3).^- Turns a random enemy into a Mimic with 5 armored hit points that drops 10x normal gold when killed.^- A random ally is assigned one of their skins at random until you change areas.^- Jim shoots a line of gold coins out across the field, dealing damage to all enemies in a line and dropping one enemy's worth of gold.^^Note: Transformations don't affect bosses or special enemies.

每次$(trigger_every)攻击时，吉姆就会使用惊异魔杖。这会提供五个随机效果之一：^^将一名随机敌人变成一只大疣蟾，使其眩晕 $(stun_time___2) 秒，并在眩晕结束后使其减速 $(slow_time___2) 秒。它保持变形前的生命值。^- 将一名随机敌人变成深渊鸡，将其最大生命值降低 $(reduce_health_orders_of_mag___3) 个数量级，最低降为 $(min_health___3)。^- 将一名随机敌人变成一个拥有 5 点重甲生命值的拟形怪，被杀死时会掉落 10 倍的普通金币。^- 一位随机盟友被随机分配自己的一件皮肤，直到你改变区域。^- 吉姆射出一行金币穿过战场，对一条线上的所有敌人造成伤害，并掉落一名敌人的金币。^^注意：首领和特殊敌人不受变形影响。

The effect of Fan Club is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% each time an enemy, ally, or ally's equipment is polymorphed or transformed in some way, stacking multiplicatively up to $(max_stacks) times. Stacks reset when changing areas.
每当一个敌人、盟友或盟友的装备进行了变形，“粉丝俱乐部”的效果提升$(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠最多 $(max_stacks) 次。改变区域时重置堆叠。

tipText.original: Jim's abilities are empowered whenever enemies or allies are polymorphed or otherwise transformed.
tipText.display: 当敌人或盟友被变形或以其他方式变形时，吉姆的技能就会增强。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Fan Club by $(amount)%
使“粉丝俱乐部”的效果提升 $(amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Jim's Fan Club grows more and more fervent.
specializationDescription.display: 吉姆粉丝俱乐部变得越来越狂热。

description.desc: Increases the damage of all Champions whose base attacks are magic by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion whose base attacks are magic in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位以法术为基本攻击方式的勇士，即为所有该类型的勇士提升 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Jim enjoys spending time surrounded by other spellcasters, comparing tricks.
specializationDescription.display: 吉姆喜欢花时间和其他施法者在一起切磋技艺。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Fan Club by $(amount)%. All members of Acquisitions Incorporated and The "C" Team in the formation join Jim's Fan Club, regardless of their position in the formation.

effect_keys.dev_note: this effect key is just for getting the number of champions targetted in the formation for the spec option post apply info

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: Acq. Inc. and "C" Team Champions in Formation: $num_stacks___3

description.desc: 使“粉丝俱乐部”的效果提升 $(amount)%。阵型中所有艾奎兹玄有限责任公司和 C 小队的成员都加入吉姆的“粉丝俱乐部”，不论他们位于阵型的什么位置。

effect_keys.dev_note: this effect key is just for getting the number of champions targetted in the formation for the spec option post apply info

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的艾奎兹玄公司和“C”小队勇士：$num_stacks___3

specializationDescription.original: Jim recruits some reluctant allies to join his Fan Club.
specializationDescription.display: 吉姆招募了一些不情愿的盟友加入他的粉丝俱乐部。

description.desc: The effect of Fan Club is increased by $(amount)% for each Champion with a non-base skin equipped in the formation, stacking additively.
阵型中每有一位勇士装备了非基础皮肤，“粉丝俱乐部”的效果就提升$(amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。
Increases the effect of Jim's specializations by $(amount)%
使吉姆的专精效果提高 $(amount)%。
Increases the effect of Jim's specializations by $(amount)%
使吉姆的专精效果提高 $(amount)%。
Increases the effect of Jim's specializations by $(amount)%
使吉姆的专精效果提高 $(amount)%。

description.original: Adept?! That's an insult to the great Jim Darkmagic!
description.display: 熟练？这是在侮辱伟大的吉姆·黑魔法！

description.original: Well, I suppose there are worse titles to have.
description.display: 好吧，我想也许还有更糟糕的头衔。

description.original: Charge in there and get me that treasure! I'll wait here.
description.display: 冲进去，然后给我把财宝弄到手！我就在这里等。

description.original: Is there an echo in here?
Nothing up my sleeve...except this fireball!
description.display: 我的袖子里什么都没有......除了这个火球！

description.original: Follow me! ...to my next show! Tickets are 20 gp!
description.display: 跟我来！......去看我的下一场演出！门票是 20 金币！

description.original: ... Seriously, guys, come on! Be amazed!
description.display: ……不是吧？拜托，各位！你们惊讶一点吧！

description.original: Get in, nerds -- we're doing magic.
description.display: 上来吧，呆子们--魔法就要上演了。

description.original: I'm Jim Darkmagic and YOUR NAME HERE is my #1 fan!
description.display: 我是吉姆·黑魔法，而你是我的头号粉丝！

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack effect of Jim's Fan Club ability by $amount%

description.original: If the coin is glowing it's mine!
You say 'Jim Winks' and then do some finger guns. Works every time.
description.display: 一边说“吉姆·秋波”，一边用手指比个手枪。屡试不爽。

effects.description: Increases the pre-stack effect of Jim's Fan Club ability by $amount%

description.original: Whoa, are these muscles? I mean -- good, MORE muscles!
description.display: 哇，这些是肌肉吗？我的意思是--很好，肌肉越多越好！

character_sheet_details.backstory: James Winifred Darkmagic III is the scion of a mysterious, multiplanar wizarding family. As an entertainer and purveyor of the 'Jim Darkmagic Experience,' the legendary mage can often be found in markets and town squares performing feats of mundane legerdemain. The renown he has earned for these feats is nearly equaled by the reputation that follows him as a Chief Arcanist (and occasional arsonist) for Acquisitions Incorporated.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Jim is a marvelous magical master. He mows through enemies with his own unique brand of magic, and synergizes with other magic users in your formation.

event_upgrades.name: Fan Club
event_upgrades.description: Jim buffs himself based on the number of Champions in the columns on front of and behind him

character_sheet_details.full_name: 詹姆斯（吉姆）·维尼弗莱德·黑魔法三世
character_sheet_details.backstory: 詹姆斯·维尼弗莱德·黑魔法三世，是一个神秘、多位面巫师家族的后代。作为一个艺人和“吉姆黑魔法体验”的传播者，这位传奇法师经常在市场和城镇广场表演他平凡的戏法。他因这些行为而赢得的声誉，几乎等同于他作为艾奎兹玄有限责任公司首席奥术师（偶尔也是纵火犯）的声誉。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 吉姆是个了不起的魔法大师。他能够用独特的魔法横扫敌人，同时与你阵型中的其他魔法使用者协同作战。
